title: autobench.curriculum.problem.rejected v1
description: Per-problem rejection telemetry from autobench.curriculum. Sibling of autobench.curriculum.problem.v1 (the success path) and autobench.curriculum.cycle.v1 (the aggregate). Emitted at two stages: (1) parse — from _parse_problems on JSON decode / shape / required-key / field-validation failures; (2) judge — from CurriculumAgent.judge_problem when LLM-side validation rejects a structurally-valid problem (unsolvable, output mismatch vs judge solution, or claimed-skills mismatch). The optional 'stage' field distinguishes them. Source: /autobench.

cycle_id.description: Cycle tag (curr-YYYY-MM-DD-<epoch>); empty when not yet assigned

row_index.description: 0-based index of the offending row in the LLM response array. Null for whole-response failures (e.g. unparseable JSON, non-array top level).

reason.description: Rejection taxonomy. Parse-stage reasons (json_decode_error, not_an_array, not_an_object, missing_required_keys, field_validation_error) come from _parse_problems. Judge-stage reasons (judge_unsolvable, output_mismatch, skill_mismatch, judge_error) come from CurriculumAgent.judge_problem under validate=True.

stage.description: Validation stage that produced the rejection. 'parse' = structural rejection during _parse_problems. 'judge' = semantic rejection during LLM-side validation. Optional; absent on older events that pre-date the field.

judge_detail.description: Additional context from the judge stage. Absent for parse-stage rejections.

judge_output.description: The judge's independently-computed output for sample_input.

actual_skills.description: Skills the judge identified as actually required.

detail.description: Human-readable explanation: exception message, missing-key summary, or type-mismatch description. Capped at 1024 chars.

missing_keys.description: Sorted list of required keys absent from the row. Only populated when reason=missing_required_keys.

raw_excerpt.description: First 1024 chars of the offending JSON (the row, or the whole response for top-level failures). Capped to keep the bus payload bounded.

generator_model.description: Model identifier of the curriculum generator (e.g. MiniMax-M2.7).
